title: poidium juergensii
intro: Poidium juergensii, also known as Bushwillow, is a plant species native to Southern Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Poidium juergensii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to reduce pain and inflammation in various conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction by boiling the bark and leaves in water, and is also used to make a tincture for its medicinal properties.
